title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.689 - Investment fiduciary may make investments in certain countries
text:
105.689.  Investment fiduciary may make investments in certain countries. — Nothing in sections 105.687 to 105.689 shall prevent any investment fiduciary from making investments in any company which does business in any country with which the United States maintains diplomatic relations.
(L. 1987 S.B. 20 § 3, A.L. 1992 S.B. 499, et al.)
